# Loopvico Laundry & Linen

> Loopvico is a laundry pickup and delivery service in the DFW Metroplex. The business serves Mansfield, Arlington, Irving, Las Colinas, and Grand Prairie, Texas.

## Contact

- Website: https://loopvico.com/
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/19453126685
- Phone: +1 (945) 312-6685
- Email: loopvico@gmail.com

## Services

- Wash-and-fold laundry pickup and delivery
- Flat-rate clothing bags
- Towels, robes, sheets, bath mats, and other linen laundry
- Monthly subscription plans for recurring household laundry
- Support for homes, short-term rental hosts, and light commercial laundry needs

## Service Areas

- Mansfield, Texas
- Arlington, Texas
- Irving, Texas
- Las Colinas, Texas
- Grand Prairie, Texas

## Important Pages

- Home: https://loopvico.com/
- Pricing section: https://loopvico.com/#pricing
- Subscriptions section: https://loopvico.com/#subscriptions
- Contact section: https://loopvico.com/#contact

## Booking

Preferred booking is via WhatsApp. Customers can also call or text with their pickup address, preferred day, and ZIP code to confirm service coverage and schedule a pickup.
